1: use anyhow::{Result, bail};
2: 
3: use crate::cmd::push::push_or_update_pr;
4: use crate::error::EzError;
5: use crate::git;
6: use crate::github;
7: use crate::stack::StackState;
8: use crate::ui;
9: 
10: fn branches_to_submit(path_to_trunk: &[String], trunk: &str) -> Vec<String> {
11:     path_to_trunk
12:         .iter()
13:         .rev()
14:         .filter(|b| b.as_str() != trunk)
15:         .cloned()
16:         .collect()
17: }
18: 
19: pub fn run(
20:     draft: bool,
21:     no_draft: bool,
22:     title: Option<&str>,
23:     body: Option<&str>,
24:     body_file: Option<&str>,
25:     repo_override: Option<&str>,
26:     remote_override: Option<&str>,
27: ) -> Result<()> {
28:     let mut state = StackState::load()?;
29:     if let Some(root) = git::current_linked_worktree_root()? {
30:         ui::linked_worktree_warning(&root);
31:     }
32: 
33:     let current = git::current_branch()?;
34: 
35:     if state.is_trunk(&current) {
36:         bail!(EzError::OnTrunk);
37:     }
38: 
39:     if !state.is_managed(&current) {
40:         bail!(EzError::BranchNotInStack(current.clone()));
41:     }
42: 
43:     // Resolve draft: --draft/--no-draft flags > config > false
44:     let effective_draft = if no_draft {
45:         false
46:     } else if draft {
47:         true
48:     } else {
49:         state.draft.unwrap_or(false)
50:     };
51: 
52:     let resolved_body: Option<String> = match body_file {
53:         Some(path) => Some(github::body_from_file(path)?),
54:         None => body.map(|s| s.to_string()),
55:     };
56: 
57:     // path_to_trunk returns [current, ..., trunk].
58:     // We want to iterate bottom-to-top (trunk-side first), skipping trunk itself.
59:     let path = state.path_to_trunk(&current);
60:     let branches_to_submit = branches_to_submit(&path, &state.trunk);
61: 
62:     if branches_to_submit.is_empty() {
63:         ui::info("No branches to submit.");
64:         return Ok(());
65:     }
66: 
67:     let body_explicitly_set = body.is_some() || body_file.is_some();
68:     let mut pr_urls: Vec<(String, String)> = Vec::new();
69: 
70:     for (i, branch) in branches_to_submit.iter().enumerate() {
71:         let parent = state.get_branch(branch)?.parent.clone();
72: 
73:         // --remote applies only to the first (bottom) branch; children inherit.
74:         let is_first = i == 0;
75:         let branch_remote_override = if is_first { remote_override } else { None };
76: 
77:         // Resolve push remote per-branch (CLI override > stored > inherited > config).
78:         let remote = match branch_remote_override {
79:             Some(r) => r.to_string(),
80:             None => state.effective_push_remote(branch),
81:         };
82: 
83:         // Push with force-with-lease.
84:         let sp = ui::spinner(&format!("Pushing `{branch}`..."));
85:         git::fetch_branch(&remote, branch)?;
86:         git::push(&remote, branch, true)?;
87:         sp.finish_and_clear();
88: 
89:         // Store push_remote when --remote was explicitly passed for this branch.
90:         if let Some(r) = branch_remote_override {
91:             state.get_branch_mut(branch)?.push_remote = Some(r.to_string());
92:         }
93: 
94:         // --repo also applies only to the first branch; children inherit via effective_pr_repo.
95:         let branch_repo_override = if is_first { repo_override } else { None };
96: 
97:         // Create or update the PR.
98:         let pr_url = push_or_update_pr(
99:             &mut state,
100:             branch,
101:             &parent,
102:             effective_draft,
103:             title,
104:             resolved_body.as_deref(),
105:             body_explicitly_set,
106:             branch_repo_override,
107:         )?;
108: 
109:         let pr_number = state.get_branch(branch).ok().and_then(|m| m.pr_number);
110:         ui::receipt(&serde_json::json!({
111:             "cmd": "submit",
112:             "branch": branch,
113:             "pr_number": pr_number,
114:             "pr_url": pr_url,
115:         }));
116: 
117:         pr_urls.push((branch.clone(), pr_url));
118:     }
119: 
120:     state.save()?;
121: 
122:     // Update stack sections on all contiguous PRs.
123:     crate::cmd::push::update_contiguous_stack_bodies(&state, &current);
124: 
125:     // Print summary.
126:     ui::success(&format!("Submitted {} PR(s):", pr_urls.len()));
127:     for (branch, url) in &pr_urls {
128:         ui::info(&format!("  {branch} -> {url}"));
129:     }
130: 
131:     Ok(())
132: }
133:
